title: Hepatitis B regional surveillance reports 2024 (data to end of 2022)
body: "Reports presenting information on hepatitis B virus disease surveillance, trends in hepatitis B diagnosis and testing, and related diseases in 9 UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) regions of England, year 2024 (showing data to end of 2022).   East of England East Midlands London North East North West South East South West West Midlands Yorkshire and Humber   Older reports are available on the National Archives.  "
